title: diplolaena mollis
intro: Diplolaena mollis, also known as the soft-fruited diplolaena, is a shrub or small tree native to eastern Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Diplolaena mollis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
